text: Recharging a previously used cartridge-operated dry chemical fire extinguisher is accomplished by

options.text: A) Authorized fire equipment servicing personnel only
B) Replacing the propellant cartridge and refilling it with powder
C) Puncturing the cartridge seal after installation
D) Recharging the cartridge and refilling it with powder

explanation: For cartridge-operated extinguishers, the propellant charge (cartridge) and the fire-extinguishing powder are stored separately. After discharge, the cartridge must be replaced and the vessel must be refilled with the specified amount of powder to ensure it functions correctly.
